---
id: refresh-subscription
title: "Refresh the EE subscription"
description: "This will refresh the subscription information from the license server and update the subscription info."
sidebar_label: "Refresh the EE subscription"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Refresh the EE subscription"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/ee-license/refresh"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This will refresh the subscription information from the license server and update the subscription info.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./refresh-subscription.RequestSchema.json")}
